title: Origins: Dazai
description: Born with the power to temporarily nullify any origin or ability with a mere touch, Dazai is a rare and powerful ally. (For Fabric)
body:
# Dazai
_"Born with the power to temporarily nullify any origin or ability with a mere touch, Dazai is a rare and powerful ally."_
`Made for Fabric, Minecraft version 1.20.2, Origins version 1.12.10, Impact: 0, Icon: Dazai`

### "No Longer Human"(Primary Use Ability, Default keybind = Right Click):
_"You can remove the origins of players by rightclicking on them with an empty hand. They return after 3 seconds."_

_Origin by Frucs, inspired by Osamu Dazai, one of the main characters in the anime Bungo Stray Dogs, a fantastic anime where superhumans exist with different powers! And also by the very cool No Longer Human Origin by Bloo Tree! No Longer Human is basicly the same origin as this but for an older version of Minecraft! I asked and got Bloo's permission to make this origin :)_

### Known Bugs: NONE! If you find any please let me know! :)
